category_sources: Official SourceForge summary describes GPL Cver as an interpreted Verilog simulator and lists Simulation and EDA categories.
source_facts.description names Pragmatic C Software GPL Cver.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title is GPL Cver.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GPL Cver site; no separate official documentation surface was identified, so homepage is used as fallback.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page exposes a Code tab for GPL Cver, which resolves to the project source tree.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge summary says GPL Cver is an open-source interpreted Verilog simulator with IEEE 1364 support.
source_facts.executables lists cver as the command-line executable.
